svg.title: Tool Registry Flow
svg.desc: A diagram showing how tool schemas, the tool registry, handlers, validation, dispatch, and tool results connect in the mini agent harness.

svg.text: Separate what the model can see from what the runtime can execute.

svg.text: The model sees definitions. The runtime owns handlers. The registry is the narrow bridge between them.
